mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an accommodative monetary policy that lowers discount rates, boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 6.0% indicates tightening labor markets, increasing corporate earnings potential and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of UNRATE < 6.0% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or UNRATE fails to decline by >0.3pp monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and falling inflation signals stable supply-side conditions, reducing volatility and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of INDPRO > 102.5 and CPIAUCSL < 237.0 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction term loses explanatory power (R² < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly rebound in GDP growth above 2.0% indicates recovering demand, increasing corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in periods of GDPC1 > 2.0% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or GDP growth fails to exceed 2.0% quarterly.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in the federal funds rate above 4.0% signals tightening monetary policy, increasing borrowing costs and generating negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS > 4.0% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or rate hikes fail to exceed 4.0% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k signals strong labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of PAYEMS > 100k are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or payrolls fail to exceed 100k monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts and real sales figures indicates strong consumer demand, increasing corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of HOUST > 1070 and RSAFS > 437k are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction term loses explanatory power (R² < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 102.0 signals weakening supply-side capacity, increasing inflationary pressures and generating negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of INDPRO < 102.0 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or industrial production fails to decline below 102.0 monthly.
